response.justification: Candidate is a Staff/Senior-level engineer with 13+ years of experience applying for an entry-level role. Strong technical match on TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, and Kubernetes, but severe seniority mismatch creates high flight risk, compensation misalignment, and likely under-utilization. Resume also lists all positions as based in Kenya while role requires high on-site presence (Berlin-area implied); candidate is based in Berlin which is positive, but the location inconsistency needs clarification. PostgreSQL/Nest.js not explicitly shown (MongoDB is primary DB experience).
strengths: Deep TypeScript, Node.js, and React experience across multiple production platforms
Hands-on AWS (CDK), Docker, and Kubernetes exposure exceeds nice-to-have bar
Berlin-based with relevant German market experience (RIDE Capital, Optilyz)
concerns: Massive seniority overshoot — Staff/Senior engineer for a junior/mid IC role
No PostgreSQL or Nest.js specifically; primary relational/NoSQL experience is MongoDB
Only basic German listed; renewable-energy/construction-tech consulting often requires stronger local language skills
